chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-713 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 09.09.2025 Mr. Ayazuddin Samoo, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG. along with SIP Ali Gohar SHO PS Phulji Village, District Dadu ---- The Petitioners are present in Court along with their Counsel. Petitioner No.1 has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure but against wishes of her parents/relatives hence being annoyed one of her relatives namely Allah Bux (Respondent No.4) has got subject FIR lodged which is based on wrong facts. SHO PS Phulji Village present has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in which she has reiterated the same facts. In the light of her statement, the SHO present submits that he would dispose of this case and would submit such report before the learned Magistrate concerned. After such report is submitted, learned Magistrate concerned shall pass an appropriate order on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O./SHO disposing of the case, in accordance with law. Petitioners are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. Police officials present are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
